signals.headline: $280M+ DRIFT PROTOCOL EXPLOIT IMPACTS SOLANA ECOSYSTEM | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
$280M+ DRIFT PROTOCOL EXPLOIT IMPACTS SOLANA ECOSYSTEM | YES | HIGH confidence**
A critical security incident involving social engineering and pre-approved transactions resulted in a $280M+ exploit on Drift protocol, causing SOL to decline 13% over the prior week and trade near $78-80 support levels.[4] This undermined institutional confidence despite positive technical developments.

signals.headline: INTERACTIVE BROKERS LAUNCHES SOL TRADING FOR EUROPEAN INVESTORS | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
INTERACTIVE BROKERS LAUNCHES SOL TRADING FOR EUROPEAN INVESTORS | YES | HIGH confidence**
Interactive Brokers opened Solana (SOL) trading access for European investors through Zero Hash, expanding institutional distribution channels.[2] However, SOL remained compressed at critical support levels rather than breaking higher despite this catalyst.[2]

signals.headline: SOLANA MAINTAINS DEX DOMINANCE FOR SEVENTH CONSECUTIVE MONTH | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SOLANA MAINTAINS DEX DOMINANCE FOR SEVENTH CONSECUTIVE MONTH | YES | HIGH confidence**
Solana surpassed all Layer 1 and Layer 2 networks in monthly DEX trading volume, reporting $57 billion in volume during March 2026, outperforming Ethereum and competitors.[3]
